articles.summary: Yes, we said it. Customer interviews & financial analysis found that a composite organization experienced benefits of $23.5 million over three years and an ROI of 413% with Dataiku [4]. Plus, 80% time savings on manual processes, reduced costs, and improved decision making on key business activities.

articles.title: AI2'S NEW MODEL SURPASSES DEEPSEEK V3
articles.summary: AI2's Tulu-3, a 405B parameter open-weight language model, surpasses DeepSeek V3 and even OpenAI's GPT-4o on key benchmarks.

articles.title: MISTRAL SMALL 3
articles.summary: Mistral has released a very powerful 24B model that achieves strong performance, especially in multilingual data. It is the perfect size for deployment and strength.

articles.title: FIGURE AI DETAILS PLAN TO IMPROVE HUMANOID ROBOT SAFETY IN THE WORKPLACE
articles.summary: Figure AI is establishing the Center for the Advancement of Humanoid Safety to address gaps in safety for robots in workplaces. Led by former Amazon Robotics safety engineer Rob Gruendel, the initiative will focus on testing and certifying robots to industrial safety standards. The company aims to provide transparency with quarterly updates on testing processes and improvements.

articles.title: AI-POWERED BIOACOUSTIC MONITORING
articles.summary: Acoupi is an open-source Python framework that simplifies the deployment of AI-based bioacoustic monitoring on low-cost devices. It integrates recording, processing, and real-time messaging.

articles.title: 3D OCCUPANCY PREDICTION
articles.summary: SliceOcc introduces a novel vertical slice representation for 3D semantic occupancy prediction in dense indoor environments. It achieves state-of-the-art performance using an RGB camera-based model.

articles.title: EXPLAINABLE QUERY OPTIMIZATION
articles.summary: Reqo is a new query optimization model that leverages Bi-GNN and probabilistic ML to improve cost estimation accuracy. It introduces an explainability technique that highlights the contribution of query subgraphs.

articles.title: FINALLY, AN AD SPOT TECHIES WON'T SKIP
articles.summary: Tech inboxes are crowded, but TLDR stands out—and so do the ads inside. With over 5 million software devs, founders and other tech decision-makers tuning in daily, this is where ideas, tools, and

articles.title: products get noticed. Learn more about advertising with TLDR.
BYPASSING LLM GUARDRAILS WITH VIRUS
articles.summary: VIRUS is a method designed for generating adversarial data that can bypass moderation systems and disrupt the safety alignment of large language models.

articles.title: RIGGING CHATBOT ARENA RANKINGS
articles.summary: Researchers demonstrate that crowdsourced voting on Chatbot Arena can be manipulated to boost or lower model rankings using strategic rigging techniques, impacting the leaderboard's reliability.

articles.title: QWEN2.5-VL COOKBOOKS
articles.summary: Qwen2.5-VL, an amazing new vision language model, has a companion set of cookbooks that show how to use the model for various different tasks.

articles.title: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE IS TRANSFORMING MIDDLE-CLASS JOBS. CAN IT ALSO HELP THE POOR?
articles.summary: Generative AI adoption is surging globally, with 66% of leaders prioritizing AI skills over traditional experience. However, access disparities hinder adoption in developing regions, where only a small percentage can leverage GenAI due to limited digital infrastructure. Addressing infrastructure and education gaps is crucial to prevent AI from widening global inequalities.

articles.title: A NEW WAY TO TEST AI FOR SENTIENCE: MAKE IT CONFRONT PAIN
articles.summary: Researchers from Google DeepMind and LSE conducted a study using a text-based game to explore AI "sentience," testing LLMs by having them choose between options with varying pain and pleasure associations. Findings revealed some models prioritized avoiding pain over scoring points, suggesting a potential framework for assessing AI consciousness.

articles.title: AI'S CODING PROMISES, AND OPENAI'S LONGEVITY PUSH
articles.summary: The second wave of AI coding is advancing, allowing models to prototype, test, and debug code, potentially moving developers into more supervisory roles. OpenAI has entered longevity science with a model that designs proteins to transform cells into stem cells, claiming results surpassing human efforts. Cleaner jet fuels from alternative sources are gaining momentum, promising significant emission reductions and prompting industry shifts.

articles.title: OMI RAISES $2M TO BUILD THE FUTURE OF AI WEARABLES
articles.summary: Omi has raised $2M to develop an AI wearable that enhances mind and productivity.

articles.title: AI ISN'T VERY GOOD AT HISTORY
articles.summary: A new benchmark, Hist-LLM, revealed that leading LLMs like GPT-4, Llama, and Gemini struggle with high-level historical questions.

articles.title: OSCAR HOPEFUL 'THE BRUTALIST' USED AI DURING PRODUCTION
articles.summary: The filmmakers of 'The Brutalist', driven by budget constraints, used AI from Respeecher to enhance actors' Hungarian pronunciation and generate architectural drawings.
